implementation_summary: lima.py: Replaced two Alpine-referencing comments with Ubuntu-appropriate text (AC7).
docs/architecture.md: Updated ASCII diagram (Alpine→Ubuntu), image URL, APK→APT reference, performance section (Alpine→Ubuntu image times).

docs/configuration.md: Updated all 'Installed via Alpine apk' → apt/NodeSource/etc.; removed opencode Alpine rejection note; removed Alpine/musl ripgrep workaround mention; 'bare Alpine VM' → 'bare Ubuntu VM'; removed --distro flag section.
docs/supply-chain-security.md: Removed Alpine image hash-mismatch rationale line; updated downloads table (Alpine→Ubuntu image).
docs/testing-infrastructure.md: Replaced 'Alpine vs Ubuntu' with 'host differences, VM image variants'.

README.md: Removed 'Alpine Linux (default)' from Supported Distributions; removed distro wizard step from example; removed §7 'Change Distribution' section; removed distro: line from config example; updated Python boot note.
user-stories.md: Fixed three alpine-specific lines (apk, MongoDB Alpine note x2).
specs/spec.md: Updated Base OS, image URL reference, opencode clause, Ansible roles table (apk→apt/systemd), performance timing, constraint, External Dependencies.

CHANGELOG.md: Consolidated Removed section per NFR5 (Alpine support, --distro flag, vm.distro field, *-alpine roles, wizard step). Added Changed line 'Ubuntu 24.04 LTS is now the sole supported guest OS'. Removed duplicate wizard step entry. Cleaned opencode Added entry.
